goal: Add a side-effect-free decision layer for whether the read-only cockpit may use accepted Live AICOS data as a future model source, without changing cockpit routes, renderers, runtime actions, or live wiring.
scope_out: Do not change the cockpit route, renderer, server mount, runtime route, live connector, or package files.
Do not make cockpit actions executable.
claims: Live AICOS can become a future cockpit model source only after accepted network intake and operator review.
Sample/manual cockpit modes remain distinct from live AICOS sourcing.
Read-only and disabled-action invariants remain mandatory.
assumptions: A later block may build the actual read-only live model adapter.
dod: Live AICOS source readiness requires accepted network result and operator review reference.
Network blockers block live source readiness.
Sample-only mode keeps live source closed.
Focused tests, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route, renderer, runtime, provider, DB, GitHub, live wiring, package, or workflow changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-021 mounted a read-only cockpit route and BPK-022 added an unmounted Live AICOS network connector. BPK-024 may decide future source readiness without wiring them together.
